description.value: **Benefit:** As a free action when you have no conscious allies within 30 feet of you, you can call upon your solitary prowess to enter a focused state. While in this state, your melee attacks deal an additional 1d6 points of damage. This damage is not multiplied on a critical hit. You can remain in this state for a number of rounds per day equal to your Hit Dice. These rounds do not need to be consecutive.
